# Imagegen 提示词归档

生成方式：Codex 内置 `image_gen` 工具。  
生成时间：2026-06-22。  
用途：滑动拼图游戏正式主题图，覆盖旧的低质 PIL 占位图。  
共同约束：方形 1024x1024，无文字、无中文、无 logo、无水印、无 UI 边框、无拼图网格、无标签。

## star_lighthouse.png

```text
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: square artwork for a pygame sliding puzzle game
Primary request: "星海灯塔" high-end puzzle artwork, a solitary white lighthouse on a rugged island under a vast star-filled ocean sky, luminous beam crossing moonlit waves, distant constellations reflected in water, inviting and magical
Style/medium: premium painterly digital illustration, cinematic board-game cover quality, richly detailed, crisp readable shapes for puzzle pieces
Composition/framing: square 1024x1024, strong central lighthouse silhouette, layered foreground rocks and waves, distinct sky/water/land regions that make a sliding puzzle satisfying
Lighting/mood: moonlit blue atmosphere with warm golden lighthouse beam, elegant, immersive, polished
Color palette: deep ultramarine, moon silver, warm amber, sea teal, small coral accents
Materials/textures: textured stone, foamy water, soft clouds, sparkling stars
Constraints: no text, no Chinese characters, no logo, no watermark, no UI frame, no puzzle grid overlay, no labels, no people, no copyrighted characters
Avoid: flat vector style, childish clipart, low-detail icon look, blurry or muddy composition
```
